name: Phase 12 Production SaaS hardening and market release requirements matrix

evidence: docs/phases/PHASE_12_PRODUCTION_SAAS_HARDENING_MARKET_RELEASE.md freezes P12-001 scope and acceptance criteria before implementation.

docs/operations/PHASE_12_PRODUCTION_DEPLOYMENT_ENVIRONMENT.md defines the production-like deployment target, required env variables, secret-reference rule, smoke endpoint, and non-scope for real cloud credentials.
.env.example contains P12 deployment variable names with empty values only.

apps/api/src/phase12Deployment.ts implements deterministic env validation for production_like/production targets, URL checks, secret-reference validation, external-service mode checks, fixture-only switch denial, and redaction-by-design DTOs.
GET /health/deployment exposes safe deployment-smoke readback without returning raw secret values or secret references.

rows.requirement: Observability, error monitoring, and release readiness read model
evidence: docs/phases/PHASE_12_PRODUCTION_SAAS_HARDENING_MARKET_RELEASE.md freezes P12-002 scope and acceptance criteria before implementation.

apps/api/src/phase12Readiness.ts implements a typed release-readiness read model with deployment status, local observability evidence, no-live-external-dependency check, P12 E2E/matrix blockers, open blocker summaries, and redaction policy.
GET /api/ops/release-readiness returns tenant-scoped readiness state for authorized tenant admins only and does not expose secret references.
packages/access-control runtime catalog via apps/api/src/phase2Runtime.ts includes ops.read and release.readiness.read permissions for tenant admins; read-only observers are denied by backend guard.

evidence: docs/phases/PHASE_12_PRODUCTION_SAAS_HARDENING_MARKET_RELEASE.md freezes P12-003 scope and acceptance criteria before implementation.

docs/operations/PHASE_12_RECOVERY_BACKUP_POLICY.md defines deterministic in-memory recovery smoke, production backup requirements, audit expectations, and non-scope for real production database backup execution.
apps/api/src/phase12Recovery.ts implements tenant-scoped deterministic recovery smoke state, before/simulated-failure/after snapshots, latest-run readback, and resettable in-memory runtime.
GET /api/ops/recovery-smoke and POST /api/ops/recovery-smoke/run enforce ops.read/ops.execute, write audit event ops.recovery_smoke.run, and expose API readback without cross-tenant leakage.

rows.requirement: Security, privacy, and audit review fixes
evidence: docs/phases/PHASE_12_PRODUCTION_SAAS_HARDENING_MARKET_RELEASE.md freezes P12-004 scope and acceptance criteria before implementation.
docs/security/PHASE_12_SECURITY_PRIVACY_AUDIT.md records the Phase 12 repository-local security/privacy/audit review, scan evidence, fixed fixture-auth finding, and residual E2E gate.

apps/api/src/app.ts centralizes route-level fixture session resolution through requireRouteSession and supports createApiApp({ allowTestFixtureAuth: false }) returning 403 test_mode_only before permission evaluation.

apps/api/src/server.ts disables backend fixture auth for NODE_ENV=production, KISS_PM_RUNTIME_ENV=production_like, and KISS_PM_RUNTIME_ENV=production unless KISS_PM_ALLOW_TEST_FIXTURE_AUTH=true is explicitly set.
apps/api/src/phase12Deployment.ts fails production_like/production smoke when KISS_PM_ALLOW_TEST_FIXTURE_AUTH=true, matching frontend fixture-auth and fixture-reset denial.
